# Test execution

Run cases, record UAT/bugs, close the test report; use `uat-checklist`.

## When to use
- Task `test.test-execution`

## Cover
- Execute approved cases; log evidence
- Track bugs to closure
- Complete test report artifact

## Rules
- Do not waive failures without human/policy waiver
- Gate: `hx gate check <change> --stage test --task test-execution`

## Done when
UAT, bugs, and report sensors are green
